# Golden diagnostic lines for the px4xplane HITL versioned grammar (diag_version=1).
#
# These are EMITTER-DERIVED fixtures: each line below reproduces the exact field
# list / order / format tokens of the corresponding C++ snprintf() that produces
# the log line. They are the authoritative regression target for the parsers in
# scripts/hitl_diagnostic_bundle.py (RATE_RE, TIMESTAMP_RE, TRANSPORT_EVENT_RE).
#
# IMPORTANT: If any of the C++ format strings below change (new field, reorder,
# renamed token, version bump), these goldens MUST be regenerated and the parser
# regexes / SUPPORTED_DIAG_VERSION updated in lockstep. run_self_test() asserts
# the regexes match each golden line and that diag_version/generation parse to
# the expected values, so format drift is catchable in review.
#
# Source-of-truth C++ emitters (path:line at time of authoring):
#   RATE       -> src/px4xplane.cpp:653-667   (snprintf "[RATE] ...")
#   TIMESTAMP  -> src/TimestampProvider.cpp:94-105 (snprintf "[TIMESTAMP] ... event=clock_advance")
#   SUMMARY    -> src/MAVLinkManager.cpp:442-445  (snprintf "[TIMESTAMP_SUMMARY] ...")
#   TRANSPORT  -> [TRANSPORT_EVENT] JSON object (diag_version + generation keys)
#
# Format: each non-comment, non-blank line is "<KIND>\t<golden log line>".
# Expected diag_version=1, generation=2 for every golden line below.
RATE	px4xplane: [RATE] diag_version=1 generation=2 wall_time_usec=123456000 sim_time=20.0s HIL_SENSOR window_msgs=1000 total_msgs=1000 wall_window_sec=40.000 rate_hz=25.00 target_hz=60 estimated_fps=52.3 paused=0 dt_p50_bucket_usec=45000 dt_p95_bucket_usec=60000 dt_max_usec=61000
TIMESTAMP	px4xplane: [TIMESTAMP] diag_version=1 generation=2 wall_time_usec=123456200 event=clock_advance branch=normal-delta raw_flight=20.000000 delta_sec=0.040000 step_clock_sec=21.000000 last_dt_usec=40000 capped=0 drift_ms=+1.000
TIMESTAMP	px4xplane: [TIMESTAMP] diag_version=1 generation=2 wall_time_usec=123456200 event=clock_advance branch=normal-delta raw_flight=20.000000 delta_sec=0.040000 step_clock_sec=21.000000 last_dt_usec=40000 capped=0 drift_ms=unmeasured
SUMMARY	px4xplane: [TIMESTAMP_SUMMARY] diag_version=1 generation=2 wall_time_usec=123456300 branch=normal-delta raw_flight=20.000000 callback_delta_sec=0.040000 step_clock_sec=21.000000 drift_ms=unmeasured capped=0 HIL_SENSOR samples=1000 last_dt_usec=40000 min_usec=39000 p50_bucket_usec=45000 p95_bucket_usec=60000 max_usec=61000 mean_usec=40000.0 lt1000=0 hist_us=<1:0,1-5:0,5-15:0,15-25:0,25-35:0,35-45:1000,45-60:0,60-100:0,>100:0> HIL_GPS samples=100 last_dt_usec=400000 min_usec=390000 p50_bucket_usec=400000 p95_bucket_usec=400000 max_usec=410000 mean_usec=400000.0 lt1000=0 hist_us=<1:0,1-5:0,5-15:0,15-25:0,25-35:0,35-45:0,45-60:0,60-100:0,>100:100>
TRANSPORT	px4xplane: [TRANSPORT_EVENT] {"diag_version":1,"wall_time_usec":123456100,"event":"client_connected","generation":2,"estimated_fps":24.6,"flight_loop_counter":42}
